loginPage.title: Login
loginPage.description: Enter your email to login to your account.

loginPage.loginFailedDescription: Could not sign in with social account. Please try again later.

registerPage.description: Join us and start your cyberpunk trading journey.

registerPage.termsAgreement: I have read and agree to the
registerPage.termsRequirement: You must agree to our terms to continue.

userNav.logoutTestSuccess: You have logged out of the test account.
userNav.logoutSuccess: You have been successfully logged out.

accountPage.title: My Profile
accountPage.personalInfoDescription: Update your personal details and view account status.
accountPage.bioPlaceholder: Tell everyone a little about yourself...
accountPage.saveSuccessDescription: Your changes have been saved successfully.
accountPage.creditDescription: Your current standing on the platform.

newProductPage.title: List a New Item
newProductPage.description: Fill in the details below to put your item on the market.
newProductPage.dragAndDrop: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
newProductPage.cannotListDescription: KYC verification is required to list items.
newProductPage.kycRequiredDescription: Your account is not KYC verified. To ensure the safety of the platform, you must complete verification before you can list items.

supportPage.description: Have an issue? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you.

accountPurchases.title: My Purchases

accountWallet.title: My Wallet
accountWallet.noTransactions: Recent transactions will be displayed here.

accountKYC.title: KYC Verification
accountKYC.status.pendingDescription: Your documents are under review. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
accountKYC.status.notVerifiedDescription: Please complete verification to access all features.
accountKYC.submitDescription: Please upload a government-issued ID and a selfie for verification.
accountKYC.selfieUploadDescription: Hold your ID next to your face.

productCardActions.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
